schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this stored envelope (e.g., '1.0').

executionMode.description: Execution mode. If omitted, treated as 'event' for backward compatibility.

operation.description: Present only when executionMode='job'. Describes the operation to execute.

senderId.description: Optional sender identifier if source system has multiple senders.

receivedAtUtc.description: When the webhook was received by ICP Relay (UTC).

tenantKey.description: Business routing key, typically 'source:tenant' (e.g., 'example:company-0'). Used for Db and idempotency PK scope.

eventType.description: Raw source event/job type. (EventType in ICP)

subject.description: Optional subject of the event if easily available at ingest time.

key.description: Idempotency key (e.g., sha256 of payload, or source entity+revision).

algorithm.description: How the idempotency key was derived.

scopeKey.description: Scope for idempotency, typically equals routing.tenantKey.

payloadRef.description: Reference to raw payload stored in blob (e.g., 'blob://...').

contentType.description: Optional content type of the raw payload (e.g., 'application/json').

canonical.description: Canonical event representation conforming to the ICP Relay CanonicalEvent schema.
canonical.title: ICP Relay CanonicalEvent

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this canonical event (e.g., "1.0")

data.description: RecordData - a generic, source-agnostic record payload for targets
data.title: ICP Relay RecordData

dataSchemaId.description: Source/profile identifier for the RecordData payload (e.g., shopify.order.created.v1).

attributes.description: Flat, typed attributes (key/value) for reporting and generic rendering.

relations.description: Relations to other entities (place, actor, template, parent, organization, etc.).

items.description: Items such as Q/A pairs, rows, metrics. Used for generic targets (Teams/SQL).

links.description: URLs to open the original entity in its source system (and other relevant links).

role.description: Optional role for actor relations (inspector, reporter, created_by, assignee, ...).

valueId.description: Optional identifier for the value (e.g., choiceId).

errors.description: Optional list of errors (for failed/unknown cases).

links.description: Optional URLs to open the original entity in the source system.

tags.description: Optional tags for filtering and grouping.

body.error: handler "@{body('Parse_IntegrationInstance')?['integrationTarget']}" failed - failed to upsert service bus message to queue "@{concat('icp-targets-', body('Parse_IntegrationInstance')?['integrationTarget'])}". (correlationId:@{body('Parse_Message')['correlationId']})
